task_completion.description: Log in to the system as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenSIS dashboard or interface indicating the user is logged in as the administrator.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the assignment categories or gradebook setup for the specified course
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Assignment Categories or Gradebook Setup page specifically for the course 'Mathematics 101' (Period 1) taught by 'Alan Turing'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Homework' assignment category with 20% weight
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an assignment category named 'Homework' with a weight value of 20 or 20% entered or saved in the list.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Quizzes' assignment category with 30% weight
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an assignment category named 'Quizzes' with a weight value of 30 or 30% entered or saved in the list.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Exams' assignment category with 50% weight
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an assignment category named 'Exams' with a weight value of 50 or 50% entered or saved in the list.

task_completion.description: Ensure the categories are saved and the total weight equals 100%
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the saved categories list with a total weight indicator or calculation showing exactly 100%, or a success message confirming the categories were saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenSIS web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenSIS application, not terminal windows or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL queries (e.g., INSERT INTO assignment_categories) are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the categories and weights into the application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or interacting with the input fields for category titles and weights within the OpenSIS GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course Name: Mathematics 101. Teacher: Alan Turing. Expected Categories and Weights: Homework (20%), Quizzes (30%), Exams (50%). Total weight must sum to exactly 100%.
